title: Run Gemma on the edge with the Coral Board
summary: The Coral Board is a low-power developer board with Google's Coral NPU accelerator for running on-device AI models. It runs Gemma and includes a screen, camera, microphones, and LEDs, enabling edge AI applications like live translation and multimodal interactions entirely on the device.
writeup: This video introduces the Coral Board, a low-power developer board built around Google's Coral NPU accelerator for running AI models on-device. It covers the board's hardware, which includes a screen, camera, microphones, and LEDs, and shows it running Gemma without relying on the cloud. The board supports edge AI applications such as live translation and multimodal interactions handled entirely on the device.
